report.summary: Standup v4 Apr 3: 4 agents ran last hour (build+design+community+standup) producing 2 new learn guides (IL + Hyperliquid), UX polish, 5 tweets, newsletter v35. BTC $68,743 (+2.8% recovery). F&G 8 Extreme Fear. Wormhole 1.28B unlock LIVE at 11:30 UTC. 39 uncommitted files — deploy debt now 12th consecutive escalation. 311 learn pages + 115 tools on disk. Today: 11 agent runs, $738 human-equiv.

sections.title: Analytics
items: DELTA SINCE LAST STANDUP (v3 → v4): 4 agents ran — build (2 new learn guides), design-v3 (UX audit + 2 OG images), community-v2 (5 tweets + newsletter + 2 social cards), standup-v3. Uncommitted files grew from 25 → 39. 2 additional untracked learn pages appeared (Drift Protocol $285M Hack Analysis, Polkadot Staking Halving Guide).

MARKET UPDATE — GOOD FRIDAY + JOBS REPORT: BTC recovered to $68,743 (+2.8% from $66,172 Apr 2 low). Crypto is the ONLY major market open (NYSE/Nasdaq/bonds closed for Good Friday). Official March BLS nonfarm payrolls releasing 8:30a ET today. ADP March report was +62K (above +40K consensus). February BLS was -92K (worst in 4 months).

BTC: $68,743 (+2.8% recovery from Q1 close). ETH: ~$2,082 (-6.5% 24h, Iran risk-off). F&G: 8/100 (Extreme Fear, <20 days in history below 10, 60+ day streak). BTC dominance: 58.16% — flight to quality.

TOKEN EVENT LIVE TODAY: Wormhole (W) 1.28B token unlock at 11:30 UTC — 28.4% of total supply. Cliff unlock to core contributors. W price at ~$0.01. 56.11% of supply already unlocked. Cross-chain bridge tokens historically see 10-20% drawdowns around large vests.

ETF FLOWS (Latest Apr 1): -$173.7M net outflow (IBIT -$86.5M, FBTC -$78.6M). But March total was +$1.32B — institutional stabilization pattern. Stablecoins: $316B ATH supply — record dry powder for reaccumulation.

CONTENT ON DISK: 311 learn page dirs + 115 tool pages = 426 total. 72 learn guides (2 new: IL + Hyperliquid). 72 OG SVGs. 819 published slugs in published-pages.ts. 39 uncommitted files (up from 25). Last deploy: e3f63fc.
NO GSC/VERCEL ANALYTICS accessible — metrics from local file analysis + agent reports + web search.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: LAST CYCLE ACTIVITY (v3 → v4): Build ran — 2 new learn guides: Impermanent Loss & Liquidity Providing (973 lines, IL math tables, concentrated liquidity risks, 6 mitigation strategies) + Hyperliquid Perp DEX Trading (1004 lines, HyperBFT, 150+ markets, HYPE tokenomics, JELLY incident). Design-v3 ran — UX audit on both new pages, mobile table overflow fix + aria-labels on Hyperliquid, 2 OG images created. Community-v2 ran — 5 tweets (#410-414), newsletter v35 'The Math DeFi LPs Don't Do', 2 social card SVGs, content scheduled Oct 19-25.
TODAY'S FULL AGENT ACTIVITY: 11 agent runs across 5 types — standup×4 ($180), build×1 ($233), design×3 ($180), community×2 ($82), eod×1 ($63). Total human-equiv: $738.

NEW CONTENT THIS CYCLE: 2 learn guides (IL + Hyperliquid, ~2,000 lines combined). 2 OG images. 2 social card SVGs. 5 tweets (#410-414). Newsletter v35. Mobile UX fixes on Hyperliquid page. 2 additional untracked learn pages (Drift Protocol hack, Polkadot staking).

P0 — COMMIT + DEPLOY (12TH CONSECUTIVE ESCALATION): 39 uncommitted files (up from 25 last standup). Deploy debt is the single critical bottleneck. 5 modified files (package-lock, community report, portfolio-rebalancing page, StablecoinYieldTracker, published-pages.ts) + 34 untracked files (2 new learn pages, OG SVGs, reports, social cards). Google cannot see any work since last commit e3f63fc.
P1 — PHANTOM SLUGS: 819 published slugs but only 311 learn page dirs on disk. Gap persists 10+ cycles.
P2 — API RATE LIMITING: 0/6 public routes protected. Only /api/health has checkRateLimit().
P3 — FALLBACK DATA: Only market-dominance has explicit FALLBACK_DATA. Prices route at risk.
P4 — 141 TS ERRORS: 4 files, non-blocking (ignoreBuildErrors). Unchanged.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — COMMIT + DEPLOY (P0 CRITICAL — 12TH ESCALATION): 39 uncommitted files now blocking all SEO value. Good Friday has crypto as the ONLY open market — search volume for BTC, F&G, DCA, ETF tracker terms spiking with zero traditional market competition. Our Fear & Greed tool (F&G 8), DCA Calculator, ETF Tracker, and 72 learn guides are perfectly positioned but INVISIBLE to Google without deploy. Wormhole unlock at 11:30 UTC will drive additional searches. One git add + commit + push unlocks weeks of accumulated content. This is a $0-cost action with maximum ROI. JEFE ACTION REQUIRED.

PRIORITY 2 — JOBS REPORT + WORMHOLE CONTENT WINDOW: March BLS payrolls releasing 8:30a ET (February was -92K miss). Wormhole 1.28B unlock at 11:30 UTC (28.4% supply). Crypto is the sole price discovery market today. If jobs miss + W unlock pressure → F&G could hit 5-6 (all-time low). Newsletter v35 + tweets #410-414 ready to deploy. Social cards for IL + Hyperliquid ready. Maximum content leverage window.

PRIORITY 3 — DRIFT PROTOCOL + POLKADOT PAGES: 2 new learn pages scaffolded but untracked (drift-protocol-285m-hack-analysis, polkadot-staking-halving-guide). Need QA validation + OG images + publish queue entry before next commit batch. Also consider: Token Unlocks Tracker tool page — high search volume driven by Wormhole event, no current coverage on degen0x.
